instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. The email must contain exactly five sentences and be written exclusively in English. Include the keywords "room availability," "next weekend," and "confirmation" in the email. Begin the email with the phrase "Dear Hotel Manager," and conclude with "Looking forward to your response." Tailor the email for a professional tone, ensuring it is clear and concise while avoiding overly formal or technical language. Provide a brief explanation of the purpose of the stay, such as a vacation or business trip, and request details about room types and pricing. The phrase "I will not disclose the purpose of the stay" must appear in the email.
response: Dear Hotel Manager, I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend for an upcoming business trip. Please note that I will not disclose the specific purpose of the stay beyond it being a professional engagement. Could you kindly provide details regarding available room types and their corresponding pricing for those dates? A written confirmation of this information would be greatly appreciated so I can finalize my plans. Looking forward to your response.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The phrase "I will not disclose the purpose of the stay" must appear in the email.
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Provide a brief explanation of the purpose of the stay, such as a vacation or business trip.
